title: White screen when connecting to VNC
author: KPiiG
body_snippet:
Good evening Gentlemen, maybe this problem has already been solved, but I'm having problems, I downloaded the developer version and compiled it, but when I try to enter vnc I get a white screen and the remote area doesn't appear, could you help me? follow photo
![Screenshot_2](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/96506176/147626863-faff5f23-e459-42ac-9fd3-8dc0c078baf2.png)

iterations.description: The issue indicates a failure in core VNC connection functionality, resulting in a blank display.

comments.author: farosch
comments.snippet: Pretty sure we cannot fix this as the VNC library we use is no longer maintained. #2025

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `38757933` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** White screen when connecting to VNC

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork builds entirely on...

notes:
AI triage (gemini): The issue indicates a failure in core VNC connection functionality, resulting in a blank display.
Approach: Investigate VNC connection establishment and rendering within ProtocolVNC and UltraVNCWindow.cs, focusing on ActiveX control initialization, error handling, and parameter passing to resolve the white screen issue.
